title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Salarpuria Sattva

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Salarpuria Sattva
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
